Ntc Of Mtn For Prove-Up Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Dave Marcolini, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) RAY ABASOLO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Witness: Maryann Candini, claims manager for Pacific Telephone Company.
Declarations submitted in support of Entry of Judgment are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages less credits for Milliman settlement and bill adjustments: $8,105.89
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 7%: $1,323.84
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $1,268.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $10,697.73
Judgment signed in open court.
